entry.title: Unpopular Opinion: Teacher AI use is already out of control and it's not ok
entry.quote: Here's a list of the worst AI offences I've seen in my district since the start of the spring semester last school year:

entry.title: When Disney Went Digital
entry.quote: In ‘86, it hired Pixar to overhaul the whole Disney process. The company wanted to work higher-tech and cheaper.3 Many of its analog methods — some of them older than Steamboat Willie — would be replaced. It would enter the digital age.
